1.Title: Eclipse Effect
1.Description: CRIT Rate increases by 20%. When the equipper is Pyrois, using an <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> grants the Eclipse effect. When the Eclipse effect is active, DMG dealt by the equipper ignores <color=#2BAD00>16%</color> of <color=#FE437E>Ether RES</color>, lasting 45s. Repeated triggers reset the duration. When the equipper enters combat, they gain the Eclipse effect.
